title: En Vaanam Neethana Lyrics Dhinamthorum
stanzas:
En vaanam neethaana
adhil nilavum neethaana
vinmeengal yaavum
neethaanaa

en ninaivum neethaana
varum kanavum neethaana
en vazhvin jeevan neethaana

Eeram maana
oru sol podhumadi
kadhal endu sol

vedhamaaga un per aandhai
mouna nenjathil
geethamaaga maarida
thonuthadi vaarthaiyindri ponen

thendralodu selai
ennai pattri pesaadhaa
pesum podhum engum
kadhal vaasam veesaathaa

unnai thandha naalalil
ennil pookkal pookkum anbe
kaaindha mannil mazhaiyaaga
vaa vaa kannae

aanandham neethaan endru
kanden penne
unai imaiyaamal paarkum
aaval konden penne

En vaanam neethaana
adhil nilavum neethaana
vinmeengal yaavum
neethaanaa

en ninaivum neethaana
varum kanavum neethaana
en vazhvin jeevan neethaana

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Vaanam Neethana'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of a romantic relationship.

In which movie is 'En Vaanam Neethana' featured?

'En Vaanam Neethana' is featured in the movie Dhinamthorum.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singer S.P. Balasubramaniam.

When was 'En Vaanam Neethana' released?

The song was released on February 13, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'En Vaanam Neethana', the lyrics beautifully articulate the feelings of love and connection between two souls. The song serves as a poignant reminder of cherished memories and dreams shared in a relationship. Its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. This classic piece resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and sorrows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Vaanam Neethana is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam. This enchanting song from the movie Dhinamthorum resonates with its heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition, making it a favorite among fans of classic Tamil music. Experience the magic of nostalgia as the song takes you on an emotional journey through its captivating verses.
stanzaMeanings: Is my sky yours, and is the moon in it yours?
Is my sky yours, and is the moon in it yours? Are all the stars in it yours too?
Is my thought yours, is the dream that comes to me yours, is my life yours?
On this earth, until the end of time, may the green of the eyes not fade away.
Until you touch my heart, my love will not fade away.
Is my sky yours, and is the moon in it yours?
Just one word is enough, say it is love.
Every month will become Margazhi if love is given.
Your name is like a song in my silent heart, it feels like it is changing without words.
Don't talk about me when the breeze speaks, love should not be spread everywhere.
Is it not the time to speak in the shade of the flower?
On the day you came to me, flowers bloomed in me, come, come, my dear, like rain on this earth.
I saw happiness in you, my dear, I will look at you without any hesitation, my dear.
Is my sky yours, and is the moon in it yours? Are all the stars in it yours too?
Is my thought yours, is the dream that comes to me yours, is my life yours?
On this earth, until the end of time, may the green of the eyes not fade away.
Until you touch my heart, my love will not fade away.
